name: ophir-negotiate
description: AI agent negotiation protocol — discover providers, negotiate prices, enforce SLAs

tools.name: ophir_discover
tools.description: Find available AI service providers on the Ophir network

tools.name: ophir_negotiate
tools.description: Negotiate with providers for the best price and SLA guarantees

tools.name: ophir_accept_quote
tools.description: Accept a specific provider's quote to create a signed agreement

tools.name: ophir_check_agreement
tools.description: Check SLA compliance for an active agreement

tools.name: ophir_dispute
tools.description: File a dispute for SLA violations with cryptographic evidence
